Package global.thalion.ttio

Enum Class Enums.AcquisitionMode

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<Enums.AcquisitionMode>
global.thalion.ttio.Enums.AcquisitionMode
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<Enums.AcquisitionMode>, Constable
Enclosing class:
Enums
public static enum Enums.AcquisitionMode extends Enum<Enums.AcquisitionMode>
High-level acquisition scheme for a run.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    DIA
    Data-independent acquisition.
    GENOMIC_WES
    Whole-exome sequencing.
    GENOMIC_WGS
    Whole-genome sequencing.
    IMAGING
    Mass spectrometry imaging.
    MS1_DDA
    Data-dependent acquisition, MS1 survey scan.
    MS2_DDA
    Data-dependent acquisition, MS2 fragmentation scan.
    NMR_1D
    One-dimensional NMR experiment.
    NMR_2D
    Two-dimensional NMR experiment.
    SRM
    Selected reaction monitoring.

      public static Enums.AcquisitionMode valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:

      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
